dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*\nFinally, I'm alone...
(Even though I just ate, I feel oddly tired.\n Nino and Miku kept trying to\n alternately feed me their food...)
(As expected, it was a mistake for those two\n to sit on both sides of me.)
(At times like this, Itsuki,\n who always has my back, just silently ate.)
(On the other hand, Yotsuba was considerate,\n and kept talking to me... Because of that, she \n didn't even have time to enjoy her meal.)
(I remember that there were expensive-looking dishes,\n but I can't remember what I ate at all.)
...Anyway, what was up with Nino and Miku?
(Until recently, those two haven't been too obvious \n with their rivalry.)
(Yet, even Itsuki seems to be\n turning a blind eye to their actions...)
(This trip was planned by them,\n even before I proposed it.)
(Just like how I'm trying to come up with an answer,\n they're also seeking an answer from me, right?)
(If so, this graduation trip\n isn't just about making memories.)
...We were thinking of similar things, huh.
(From the moment I agreed to this trip,\n the stage had already been set%p-2;――%p;)
I see. So that's the source of this strange feeling.
(Judging by their attitude today,\n Nino and Miku are subtly pleading \n for me to choose them.)
(If that's the case, then what about Itsuki,\n who's silently allowing it%p-2;――%p;)
(Does she hope that Nino and Miku's feelings\n will be realized, even if it causes friction\n between the sisters?)
(Yotsuba seems to be her usual self,\n but there's no way she doesn't know\n what her other sisters are thinking.)
(Ichika... I wonder...)
*sigh*
To think we talked about making memories,\nand yet I'm in this situation from day one%p-2;――
(Making memories, huh?\n Looking back, I can't believe\n I actually said that.)
(It's all my fault that we ended up in this mess,\n as I kept delaying my answer.)
(I've caused everyone pain\n by toying with their feelings.)
(...There's no way this trip can be our last.)
(They're waiting for me.\n I need to give them my answer soon.)
(That's...honestly, all I can do for now.)
(Anyway, I need to clarify my own feelings\nstarting tomorrow.)
